candidate_lesson.lesson_text: ICT entries with bars_since_signal > 100 are stale-context trades — the signal layers were valid hours ago but execution arrives after institutional positioning has reset, neutralizing the sweep/displacement edge.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A bullish sweep + displacement + FVG signal reflects a liquidity grab that institutions exploit within a tight window (minutes to a few bars). When bars_since_signal=1070, the limit/context that justified the entry is long expired: the FVG has filled, the swept liquidity has been re-accumulated, and price is now trading on fresh order flow that the original signal never measured. The system is executing on a memory, not a live imbalance — so even a perfect commitment_score=1.0 and Grade A label describe a setup that no longer exists.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if entry_context['bars_since_signal'] > 50: veto_or_size_x0.0  # require fresh signal; only execute when displacement/FVG context is current
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes stale-context losses like the AUDUSD -1.004R trade; expected to lift win rate and avgR on ICT entries, contributing toward Sharpe +0.02-0.03 by eliminating a structurally-doomed entry class.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: The only closed trade (AUDUSD ICT LONG, Grade A, commitment 1.0) lost -1.004R despite a perfect signal stack — the single distinguishing anomaly was bars_since_signal=1070.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: The AUDUSD loss had commitment_score=1.0, n_confirmations=7, full signal_layers_active (KILL_ZONE/SWEEP/DISPLACEMENT/FVG_TAP) — every quality field passed, yet bars_since_signal=1070 means the trade fired ~1070 bars after the sweep formed, indicating a stale-context execution rather than a fresh imbalance.

retirement_flag.reason: L1 ('London + Grade A + structure<1.5 → execute') gates on grade and structure but not on signal freshness; the AUDUSD loss shows a Grade A NY_Open setup with stale bars_since_signal still executed and lost — L1 may need a freshness clause to remain valid.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in 7 days with regime UNKNOWN and FOMC-day reduce-size window active means the only signal is a single stale-context loss — insufficient sample to act aggressively, so treat the bars_since_signal lesson as a candidate gate pending 15 trades.
